params.name: Chan-hee's Tea Recipe
params.description: Due to the lack of a business license, Chan-hee's tea workshop, where floral tea was being illegally produced and sold, has been legally seized. Only her secret recipe remains as a warning to future generations: improper tea production leads to tears of regret...
